messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
What it is: Onboarding tells us where a target repo's edges are, but never what it DOES — the human asked for a use-case inventory
What it solves: THE HUMAN'S WORDS. "I need this to be documented, so we can start making changes to it." / "I need
to have the various use cases it supports now, so I can tweak or add new ones."
How it works: Onboarding a target repo produces an inventory of the use cases it supports
